description_long: This object is a whole red onion with a bulbous, teardrop shape and a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The exterior is predominantly a vibrant purplish-red with subtle white streaks and a few lighter patches, typical of red onions. One end features a pale, circular root base, while the opposite end tapers gently. The onion's surface shows faint vertical ridges and a thin, papery outer skin that is mostly intact. The cut side reveals concentric, layered rings in shades of purple and white, indicating the onion's internal structure. No green shoots or roots are visible, and the object appears fresh and unblemished.
description: A whole, vibrant red onion with a smooth, slightly glossy surface and visible layered rings on the cut side. The papery skin is mostly intact, and the root base is pale and circular.
description_view_0: This view shows the onion from a side angle, highlighting the rounded, bulbous shape and the purplish-red skin with subtle white streaks.
description_view_1: This view displays the onion in profile, emphasizing its teardrop form and the smooth, continuous surface of the outer skin.
description_view_2: This view focuses on the base, showing the pale, circular root area and the gentle tapering of the onion's body.
description_view_3: This view reveals the cut side of the onion, displaying the concentric, layered rings in purple and white, and the thin, papery skin at the edge.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb appears as a single continuous structure with faintly visible concentric layers, especially on the cut side. No distinct lobes or segments are present.
attribute_papery_outer_skin: The papery outer skin is mostly intact, covering the majority of the onion. It is purplish-red in color with a slightly glossy, smooth texture.
attribute_root_tuft: A pale, circular root base is visible, but no distinct root tufts or fibers are present.
attribute_green_shoot_presence: No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible emerging from the onion.
attribute_location_relative_to_urban_ele: No urban elements or context are visible; the onion appears isolated with no indication of placement indoors, outdoors, or near man-made structures.
